languages.text: "Идея Эоганна звучит интригующе. Повелеваю установить дополнительные псайкерские аугменты всем магосам, находящимся в камерах".
"Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."
languages.original_text: "Идея Эоганна звучит интригующе. Повелеваю установить дополнительные псайкерские аугменты всем магосам, находящимся в камерах".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all magi currently stationed within the chambers."

languages.text: "Eogunns Idee klingt faszinierend. Ich ordne hiermit die Installation zusätzlicher Psioniker-Augmentationen für alle in den Zellen stationierten Magi an."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunns Idee klingt faszinierend. Ich ordne hiermit die Installation zusätzlicher Psioniker-Augmentationen für alle in den Zellen stationierten Magi an."

languages.text: « L'idée d'Eogunn est intrigante. J'ordonne que des augmétiques de psyker supplémentaires soient installés sur tous les magos actuellement dans les cellules. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."

traits.locale_text: « L'idée d'Eogunn est intrigante. J'ordonne que des augmétiques de psyker supplémentaires soient installés sur tous les magos actuellement dans les cellules. »

languages.text: «La idea de Eogunn es intrigante. Ordeno la instalación de auméticos psíquicos adicionales en todos los magos estacionados en las celdas».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."

traits.locale_text: «La idea de Eogunn es intrigante. Ordeno la instalación de auméticos psíquicos adicionales en todos los magos estacionados en las celdas».

languages.text: "Eogunn'un fikri ilginçmiş. Şu anda hücrelerde bulunan tüm Magoslara ilave ruhsezer ogmetikleri takılmasını emrediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."

languages.text: “伊奥贡的想法听起来很有趣。我命令为当前所有驻守在算法单元的贤者加装额外的灵能植入物。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's idea sounds intriguing. I command that additional psyker-augmetics be installed upon all Magi currently stationed within the cells."
